nasb.text: Thus I weighed into their hands 650 talents of silver, and silver utensils worth 100 talents, and 100 gold talents,

esv.text: I weighed out into their hand 650 talents of silver, and silver vessels worth 200 talents, and 100 talents of gold,

cnv.text: 我稱了交在他們手中的銀子，有二十二公噸，銀器重三千四百公斤、金子三千四百公斤。

ccb.text: 我交给他们的有二十二吨银子、三点四吨银器、三点四吨金子、
